name: RDX Drift Chassis
description: Build manual, gear chart and setting sheet for the Rêve D RDX competition drift chassis, plus the MC-3 conversion kit.
notes: Reference card: a chassis kit, not software. The build manual is a 28 MB illustrated exploded view, so it caches slowly on first open. Rêve D publishes no download index and their sitemap 404s, so every document URL is pinned individually and rots if they re-upload. The RDX gear chart pairs well with the Workshop's gearing calculator.
